author: y4rr
content: Plan: Add conformance tests for ConvNeXt-Tiny forward parity. Tests: output_shape (1,1000) for 224x224 input, output finite values, param count range check, custom num_classes. Reference: torchvision.models.convnext_tiny() from torchvision 0.21.x with random init and zero input. Probe shows forward passes correctly; no cascade_skip needed.
